title: Crisp Filipino Pork Skewers
description: A citrusy and adventurous Filipino dish featuring pork skewers with a sweet and sour glaze, perfect for those looking for a sugar-free-friendly option. The use of fast action yeast helps to create a crispy exterior while keeping the interior juicy.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together calamansi juice, fish sauce, lime juice, garlic, black pepper, and salt.
Add the pork pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated pork pieces onto the bamboo skewers.
In a small bowl, mix together fast action yeast and 1 tablespoon of water to create a yeast paste.
Brush the yeast paste onto the pork skewers.
Grill the pork skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked through and crispy on the outside.
Serve hot with a side of steamed vegetables or rice.
